notes: South San Francisco (San Mateo County) has no existing page or courts-data.json/venues.json entries on this site yet, so every venue below is matchStatus 'new' with existingId null; per the task instructions those two fields plus 'conflicts' are omitted from each venue record rather than written as empty/null noise. Pickleheads lists exactly 6 South San Francisco locations totaling 20 courts (2 indoor locations/6 courts: Terrabay Gym 4 + Bay Area Sportshouse (BASH) 2; 4 outdoor locations/14 courts: Sellick Park 4 + Westborough Park 4 + Buri Buri Park 4 + Stonegate Park 2) -- the arithmetic is internally consistent and all 6 are included below. WebFetch is blocked on pickleheads.com itself (confirmed again this session, consistent with prior research files in this repo); all Pickleheads-attributed facts came from WebSearch synthesis of site:pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/south-san-francisco and per-venue site: queries. IMPORTANT EXCLUSION -- Orange Memorial Park: several non-Pickleheads aggregators (Bounce, and at least one auto-generated pickleball-directory clone site) list 'Orange Memorial Park' as a 7th South San Francisco pickleball location (781 Tennis Dr, 4 outdoor courts, free), and Pickleheads itself does NOT list it. Direct verification against the City of South San Francisco's own official project page (https://www.ssfca.gov/Departments/Parks-Recreation/Parks-and-Recreation-Facility-Projects/Orange-Memorial-Park-Pickleball-Courts) shows this is a PLANNED facility, not yet built: six dedicated courts budgeted at $1.05M, design phase late 2025-early 2026, bidding early 2026, construction targeted mid-2026 (i.e. at or after this file's research date), replacing the park's existing skate park (skate elements to be relocated). The city's own separate, current-state Interactive Parks Map page for Orange Memorial Park (a different URL, listing the park's facilities as they exist today) lists only a generic 'Tennis Court' among its amenities and does not mention pickleball at all. Given the site's no-padding/no-inventing ethos and the explicit 'currently exists' requirement, Orange Memorial Park is deliberately EXCLUDED from the venues array below -- it is a real, officially-confirmed, but not-yet-operating project. A human should revisit ssfca.gov's project page for a completion update and add it once courts are actually built and open (likely mid/late 2026 at the earliest per the city's own timeline). Also explicitly excluded: 'Bay Club South San Francisco Tennis and Pickleball' -- despite the name, this facility's own Yelp listing places it at 501 Carter St, Daly City, CA, not within South San Francisco city limits, so it does not belong in this file (flagging here so it isn't mistakenly added later based on its name alone). Also flagging a research artifact caught and corrected during this pass: an early WebSearch synthesis invented a separate 'Arroyo Park' at '200 Arroyo Dr, South San Francisco' with its own court count -- this is not a real distinct park; 200 Arroyo Dr is Buri Buri Park's own confirmed address (per the City's own Interactive Parks Map and Yelp), and the 'Arroyo Park' name does not appear on ssfca.gov, Pickleheads, or Bounce. Treated as the same cross-contamination failure mode the San Mateo research file (pickleheads-research/san-mateo.json) flagged for a phantom 'Westborough Park in San Mateo' -- not written into this file as a separate venue. GENERAL COORDINATE CAVEAT: this is a brand-new city with no existing venues.json baseline to inherit lat/lon from, and Pickleheads does not publish coordinates. Every venue's lat/lon below is a best-effort estimate (from WebSearch-surfaced third-party park-locator sites for the 3 best-attested venues, and from general street/neighborhood knowledge for the other 3) rather than a confirmed exact pin -- approxLocation is true for all 6, and a human should re-geocode each address directly before merging into venues.json. No numeric Google Maps cid was found for any venue via search, so googleMapsUrl is null throughout. No Pickleheads-specific star rating (as opposed to a Google rating) was found for any venue via search, so pickleheadsRating is null throughout. City domain note: sources are split between ssfca.gov and ssf.net -- both are live City of South San Francisco domains (ssf.net appears to be an older/parallel domain; ssfca.gov is the one this session fetched directly), treated as equally official.

venues.name: Sellick Park
venues.address: 37 Buena Vista Rd, South San Francisco, CA 94080
venues.surface: Outdoor court with permanent pickleball lines (specific surface material -- asphalt vs. concrete -- not stated by any source checked)
venues.weather: Foggy & windy -- South San Francisco sits between SFO and the coastal hills, with marine layer fog common even in summer
venues.notes: Court count (4 outdoor, portable nets on permanent lines, free, walk-up, lights) is consistent across Pickleheads and Bounce independently. Address has real disagreement across sources: the City's own park page gives only a cross-street description ('Appian Way and Westborough Blvd, South San Francisco 94080', no street number); mypacer.com (an independent park-locator site, not a pickleball aggregator) gives '37 Buena Vista Rd'; other lower-confidence aggregator/clone sites gave '39 Buena Vista Rd' and '27 Appian Way'. Used mypacer's '37 Buena Vista Rd' as the best single point-address candidate since it's independent of the pickleball-aggregator ecosystem, but a human should verify the exact street number directly before publishing. The City's own park page lists only a generic 'Tennis Court' amenity and does not use the word 'pickleball' -- the pickleball use here is inferred entirely from aggregator consensus (Pickleheads + Bounce), consistent with how shared/striped tennis courts are handled elsewhere on this site.

venues.name: Westborough Park
venues.address: 2350 Galway Dr, South San Francisco, CA 94080
venues.surface: Outdoor court with permanent pickleball lines (specific surface material not stated by source)
venues.hours: Daily (specific open/close times not stated by source)
venues.weather: Foggy & windy -- South San Francisco sits between SFO and the coastal hills, with marine layer fog common even in summer
venues.notes: The best-attested venue in this file -- Pickleheads, places2play, joespickleball, findapickleballcourt, and Bounce all independently agree on 4 outdoor courts, permanent lines, bring-your-own net, free, restrooms/picnic shelter/grills. Address 2350 Galway Dr is the majority-consensus figure and matches the City's own cross-street description ('Westborough Blvd and Galway'); one source (Yelp) instead gives 2380 Galway Dr, a minor discrepancy worth a quick human double-check but not treated as a material conflict. This 9.6-acre neighborhood park was also the subject of a cross-contamination error flagged in this repo's San Mateo research file (pickleheads-research/san-mateo.json), which correctly identified it as a distinct South San Francisco venue after a search synthesis briefly mis-attributed it to San Mateo's Los Prados -- confirmed independently again in this session. Coordinates are a WebSearch-surfaced estimate, not a directly confirmed pin.

venues.name: Buri Buri Park
venues.address: 200 Arroyo Dr, South San Francisco, CA 94080
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court, permanent lines, portable nets provided
venues.weather: Foggy & windy -- South San Francisco sits between SFO and the coastal hills, with marine layer fog common even in summer
venues.notes: Court count (4 outdoor hard courts, permanent lines, portable nets, free) agrees across Pickleheads and Bounce; address (200 Arroyo Dr) is well corroborated by Yelp and the City's own park page ('200 Block of Arroyo'). Hours (5am-9pm daily) came from a WebSearch synthesis that cited the City's general parks-recreation page rather than a page this session fetched and quoted directly -- reasonably confident but flagged as slightly lower-confidence than the court-count facts. A 4.7-star rating from 33 reviews surfaced during research, but that is a Google rating, not a Pickleheads rating, so it was deliberately NOT written into pickleheadsRating (same discipline this repo's Palo Alto and San Mateo research files applied to non-Pickleheads ratings). IMPORTANT: an early research pass in this session produced a phantom 'Arroyo Park' as a seemingly separate venue at this same address -- verified false and discarded; see top-level notes. Two slightly different coordinate pairs surfaced for this address (37.6521/-122.4413 used here, vs. 37.6541/-122.4400 from another source, ~250m apart) -- both are estimates, not a confirmed pin.

venues.name: Stonegate Park
venues.address: 630 Stonegate Dr, South San Francisco, CA 94080 (per pickleball aggregators -- see notes for an unresolved conflict with the City's own facility address)
venues.weather: Foggy & windy -- South San Francisco sits between SFO and the coastal hills, with marine layer fog common even in summer
venues.notes: Court count (2 outdoor, hard surface, bring-your-own net, free, walk-up) agrees between Pickleheads and Bounce, which is why this is left confirmed:true, but there IS a real, unresolved address/name conflict worth a human's attention: Pickleheads and Bounce both call this venue 'Stonegate Park' at '630 Stonegate Dr', while the City of South San Francisco's own Interactive Parks Map lists the matching tennis facility under a different name entirely -- 'Stonegate Tennis Courts' -- at 'Ridgeview Court' (no street number given), with no mention of pickleball. Real-estate listings independently place both Stonegate Drive and Ridgeview Court within the same small 'Stonegate Terrace' residential development at the base of San Bruno Mountain State Park, so this is very likely the same physical tennis facility described via two different adjacent streets rather than two different parks -- but this session could not fully resolve which address is correct for a map pin, so both are recorded here rather than silently picking one. Also note: a similarly-named 'Stonegate Village Metro District' turned up in search results with its own 'pickleball courts' page (svmd.org) -- that is almost certainly an unrelated Colorado HOA/metro district and was deliberately NOT used as a source for this South San Francisco, CA venue. Coordinates are a rough neighborhood-level estimate only (no direct geocode found for either candidate address) -- lowest location-confidence entry in this file; strongly recommend re-geocoding before merge.

venues.name: Terrabay Gym
venues.address: 1121 South San Francisco Dr, South San Francisco, CA 94080
venues.price: $4.00 adult / $2.00 youth & seniors, drop-in (per official City Sports page); Pickleheads separately states a simpler flat '$4 one-time fee'
venues.hours: Tuesday/Thursday 12:00pm-3:00pm (official City Sports page; drop-in pickleball open play, online registration requested but drop-ins accepted if space allows) -- see notes for a conflicting third-party claim of Monday evenings instead
venues.notes: 4 indoor hard courts confirmed independently by Pickleheads, Bounce, and the official City Sports page (fetched directly). Address confirmed by the City's own Sports page and by quickscores.com, an independent sports-league scheduling platform. Real, unresolved SCHEDULE conflict: the City's own current Sports page (fetched directly this session) states pickleball open play is Tuesday/Thursday 12:00pm-3:00pm at $4.00 adult / $2.00 youth-senior, registered via the City's rec1.com catalog -- used as the primary 'hours' value as the more current, first-party source. A third-party aggregator (playpickleball.com, no visible last-updated date) instead describes Monday evenings 7pm-9pm at a flat $4, 'all levels welcome' with a house coach for beginners. These may be two different programs (an official City-run session vs. a separately organized club night), or one may simply be stale -- a human should verify directly with the City's Sports office ((650) 829-4680 per the official page) before publishing. Separately, a 2023 guest post on the local blog Everything South City -- written by Brandon Mackie, Pickleheads' own co-founder -- described this venue as having only 2 indoor hard courts at the time; read as historical evidence the program has grown from 2 to 4 courts since 2023 rather than a live conflict with today's count. Also called 'Terrabay Gymnasium and Recreation Center' / 'Terra Bay Gymnasium' by the City and other sources; used Pickleheads' shorter listed name 'Terrabay Gym' here per this repo's naming convention. Coordinates are a neighborhood-level estimate, not a confirmed pin.

venues.name: Bay Area Sportshouse (BASH)
venues.address: 147 Beacon St, South San Francisco, CA 94080
venues.surface: Indoor concrete court, dedicated permanent lines
venues.price: One-time fee (Day Pass; exact dollar amount not found in sources checked)
venues.hours: Day Pass valid 8am-10pm (per Pickleheads); exact daily open-play schedule not independently confirmed
venues.notes: Existence, indoor nature, and address (147 Beacon St, an industrial/warehouse corridor east of Highway 101 near SFO) are independently confirmed via BASH's own official website/contact page plus a live Facebook/Instagram presence and a DailyPB listing -- but the specific court count (2) and surface (concrete) come only from Pickleheads; no second source independently stated the exact court number, so treat that specific figure with slightly less confidence than the other 5 venues even though overall confirmed is left true (existence + indoor/outdoor is corroborated). Could not find BASH's exact Day Pass price in dollars despite checking their own site and DailyPB -- a human should check https://bash.ezfacility.com/login directly or call the facility. Do NOT confuse with 'Bay Club South San Francisco Tennis and Pickleball' -- a similarly-named but different facility whose own Yelp address (501 Carter St) is in Daly City, not South San Francisco; deliberately excluded from this file, see top-level notes. Coordinates are a rough estimate based on the general industrial-corridor location, not a confirmed pin.
